http://localhost:8000/docs	Interactive API documentation	✅ Open in browser
http://localhost:8000/redoc	Alternative documentation	✅ Open in browser
http://localhost:8000/v1/health	Check if API is alive	curl http://localhost:8000/v1/health
http://localhost:8000/v1/metrics	See usage statistics	curl http://localhost:8000/v1/metrics
